doc: Empirical 2-axis P(reversion | z_anchor, slope_15m) table — Level-1 meta-router simplification per docs/daily/2026-05-09.md.
source: tools/sim_decay_rules.py analysis on IS 2025-04 to 2025-10 (190,714 1m bars).
label: P_revert: probability that price hits 20-tick reversion target FIRST (within 60min) vs hitting 20-tick continuation target. P_revert >= 0.55 = trade.

z_anchor.above_high: z = (close - Mh_1h) / Sh_1h  — bins by σ above 1h_high rail
z_anchor.below_low: z = (close - Ml_1h) / Sl_1h  — bins by σ below 1h_low rail

axes.slope_15m: slope of 15m CRM over last 15 minutes (price-points/min)

above_high_short_fade._doc: SHORT-side fade: price above 1h_high. P_revert means P(price falls 20t first).

below_low_long_bounce._doc: LONG-side bounce: price below 1h_low. P_revert means P(price rises 20t first).
